summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finde R room rental marketplace MVP. Backend APIs working perfectly (10/10 tests passed), frontend UI rendering correctly, but external URL routing issue preventing frontend-backend integration.

integration_issues.issue: External URL https://finde-r-oigc.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404 - ingress routing not configured properly
integration_issues.impact: Frontend shows '0 Rooms Available' despite backend having 6 seeded rooms
integration_issues.details: Frontend configured to use external URL but backend only accessible via localhost:8001

passed_tests: Backend seed data API (6 rooms created)
Backend OTP send flow (mocked OTP working)
Frontend UI components (search bar, filters, navigation)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix external URL routing - the ingress/proxy configuration needs to route https://finde-r-oigc.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* requests to the backend service on port 8001. Currently external URL shows 'Preview Unavailable' and API calls return 404.
